name: 雙胞胎姐妹背叛＋身份掠奪
name_en: Twin sister betrayal and identity theft
description: Cora利用雙胞胎的相同外貌進行身份替換，從最初的替嫁操控到後期的直接囚禁冒充，是最極端的「親人變仇人」關係，觀眾的憤怒值持續累積直到揭露時爆發。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: She took everything from me and you. I will take everything from her. / I want her to disappear from Tristan's side completely. That way, when Tristan wakes up, the first person he sees is me, the real Cora.
examples.context: Cora利用雙胞胎的相同外貌進行身份替換，從最初的替嫁操控到後期的直接囚禁冒充，是最極端的「親人變仇人」關係，觀眾的憤怒值持續累積直到揭露時爆發。
